definition_ko: 기관 회원 자격이 필요한 접근 제한.

definition: Access deferred for an embargo period.
definition_ko: 이용 지연 (embargo) 기간 동안 접근 제한.

definition: Date when the collection was created.
notes: Used by Collection layer DateType. Different from DatasetDateType which has more values

definition: Date when the collection was updated.
Date when the collection was deleted.

notes: Source: re3data.org subjectScheme. Open vocabulary — only DFG listed in spec but other schemes possible

definition: A person to contact regarding a resource.
A person/institution responsible for finding/gathering data.
A person tasked with reviewing data and ensuring quality.
A person responsible for ongoing maintenance of data.
An institution responsible for distributing data.
A person who oversees the details related to publication.
An organization that provides financial support.
A person/organization responsible for the artistry/composition.
A person designated as principal investigator/leader of a project.
A person who manages a research project.
A person who participates in a research project.
An institution acting as a DataCite registration agent.
An institution serving as registration authority.
A person without specifically defined role.
A person involved in analyzing data or the results of an experiment.
A group of researchers working towards a common research goal.
A person/institution owning or managing property rights.
A person/organization that sponsors the resource.
A person who oversees the work of others.
A leader of a defined work package within a project.
Any contribution not described by other DataCite values.
notes: Source: DataCite contributorType. Disambiguated from other categories' 'other'

definition: Date that the publisher accepted the resource into their system.
Date the resource is made publicly available.
Date when copyright was first asserted.
Date or date range in which the resource content was collected.
Date the resource itself was put together.
notes: Source: DataCite dateType. Different from CollectionDateType_Created

definition: Date that the resource is published or distributed.
Date the creator submits the resource to the publisher.
Date of the last update to the resource.
notes: Source: DataCite dateType. Different from CollectionDateType_Updated

definition: Date or range during which the dataset was/is valid.
Repository does not support enhanced publication.
File size unit: mega bytes (1 MB = 10^6 B).
File size unit: giga bytes (1 GB = 10^9 B).
File size unit: tera bytes (1 TB = 10^12 B).
A visual representation other than text.
A resource requiring interaction from the user to be understood.
A series of visual representations imparting an impression of motion when shown in succession.
An inanimate three-dimensional object or substance.
A system that provides one or more functions.
A computer program in source or compiled form.
A resource primarily intended to be heard.
A resource consisting primarily of words for reading.

notes: DCMI standard does not include 'other'; TTA-specific addition
Source: DataCite relatedIdentifierType. 가장 흔한 식별자 유형
한국 자체 식별자. DataCite 외 추가
